approvedBy: Steve overnight keep-going instruction + Codex senior-engineer Foundation session
notes: Approved as the Foundation Frontend Monolith Split Sprint. Scope: extract nav config, data/cache helpers, and router/init helpers from public/foundation.js into classic browser modules with script-order, route-dispatch, cache-invalidation, route-budget, read-only focused proof, and full Foundation ship. Not approved: broad renderer rewrite, CSS redesign, ES module conversion, API contract changes, hub UI, Marketing live wiring, paid-source auth, source extraction, Drive permissions, Meeting Vault Phase B, or autonomous dev.
